name: slack
description: Official Slack CLI. Create and manage Slack apps, run local development, and deploy with OAuth browser login.
author: Slack

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: 'login' for OAuth browser authentication, 'run' to execute a slack command.

args_schema.name: input
args_schema.description: The slack sub-command to run (only required if action is 'run').
